note: Manual hiring-manager acceptance set. Run with human-review.mjs against a LIVE-configured endpoint; it writes human-review-sheet.md with the model outputs and EMPTY score columns. Scores (1–5) for factual accuracy, evidence quality, candor, relevance, concision, usefulness, status precision, confidence calibration, and time-saved-vs-browsing are filled in by a human — never by the model.

mode:role_comparison
questions.jd: Senior Product Designer. 5+ years shipping consumer or enterprise software; end-to-end ownership; systems thinking; design-system contributions; strong communication with leadership; partners closely with engineering.

questions.q: mode:role_comparison
questions.jd: Design Engineer. Production UI in React or React Native; owns design tokens and theming infrastructure; TypeScript; accessibility; AI-assisted development workflow; bridges design and engineering.

questions.q: mode:role_comparison
questions.jd: Product Design Manager. 3+ years managing 4+ designers; hiring and performance management; process leadership; roadmap partnership with PM and engineering; mentorship and career development.
